title: Lesson 39
paragraph: This lesson practices useful verbs for home and school.

words.meaning: to cook food in an oven
to clean or make neat with a brush

words.example: The students applaud after the song.

words.meaning: to pull air in through your nose
words.japaneseMeaning: 鼻をすする／においをかぐ
words.example: Do not sniff loudly in class.

words.meaning: to go from one side to the other
words.example: Cross the street at the light.

words.meaning: to hit a door to ask to enter
words.example: Please knock before you come in.

words.meaning: to put things into a bag or box
words.example: Pack your clothes for the trip.

words.meaning: to push with your finger or hand
words.example: Press this button to open the door.

words.meaning: to move on snow with long thin boards
words.example: We ski in the mountains in winter.
